meta.title: Months & Seasons
meta.description: Learn the months of the year and the four seasons.

explanation.en: January is the first month of the year.
explanation.ko: January는 한 해의 첫 번째 달인 1월입니다.

explanation.en: February=2월, April=4월, September=9월, December=12월.
In Korea, spring is March–May. June is the start of summer.
explanation.ko: 한국 기준 봄은 3~5월(March~May)입니다. June(6월)은 여름의 시작입니다.

questions.prompt: My birthday is in _____. It's the last month of the year. (내 생일은 12월입니다. 한 해의 마지막 달입니다.)

explanation.en: December is the 12th and last month of the year.
Use 'in' before months: 'in March', 'in July'. Never 'on March' for the whole month.
Summer is the hottest season with the longest days.
explanation.ko: 여름(summer)은 가장 덥고 낮이 가장 긴 계절입니다.

explanation.en: 'Autumn' (British English) and 'fall' (American English) both mean 가을.
The four seasons in English: spring, summer, autumn, winter.
explanation.ko: 영어의 사계절: spring(봄), summer(여름), autumn(가을), winter(겨울).

explanation.en: Christmas Day is on December 25th.
June is the 6th month of the year.
'My favorite season is + season' expresses which season you like most.
explanation.ko: 'My favorite season is + 계절'로 가장 좋아하는 계절을 표현합니다.

explanation.en: In Korea, summer is typically from June to August.
July is the 7th month: Jan(1), Feb(2), Mar(3), Apr(4), May(5), Jun(6), Jul(7).
explanation.ko: July는 7번째 달입니다: Jan(1), Feb(2), Mar(3), Apr(4), May(5), Jun(6), Jul(7).

questions.prompt: Leaves change colour and fall in _____. (가을에는 나뭇잎이 색이 변하고 떨어집니다.)

explanation.en: In autumn, leaves change to red, orange, and yellow before falling.
explanation.ko: 가을(autumn)에 나뭇잎이 빨강, 주황, 노랑으로 변한 뒤 떨어집니다.

explanation.en: October(10), November(11), December(12) — this is the correct order.

questions.prompt: 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'My birthday is on April.'

explanation.en: We use 'in' before months ('in April'), but 'on' before specific dates ('on April 5th').
explanation.ko: 월 앞에는 'in'을 씁니다('in April'). 날짜 앞에는 'on'을 씁니다('on April 5th').

questions.answer: It snows in January in Korea.

explanation.en: This sentence connects a month with a weather description.
Flowers bloom in spring when the weather gets warmer.
March=3rd, May=5th, August=8th, November=11th.

questions.prompt: 'What month is it?'에 대한 올바른 대답은?

explanation.en: 'What month is it?' asks for the name of the current month.
explanation.ko: 'What month is it?'는 현재 달의 이름을 묻습니다. 달 이름으로 대답합니다.

explanation.en: Spring (in Korea) runs from March to May.
October is the 10th month of the year.
'What is your favorite + noun?' asks about a personal preference.
explanation.ko: 'What is your favorite + 명사?'는 개인 선호를 묻는 표현입니다.

choices: Flowers bloom and it gets warm.
It is very hot and sunny.
It is cold and sometimes snowy.

explanation.en: Winter is cold and sometimes snowy — this is the correct description.

questions.prompt: 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: When is your birthday? B: It's in _____, on the 14th.'

explanation.en: 'It's in + month, on the + date' is the correct pattern for giving a birthday.
explanation.ko: 생일 표현은 'in + 월, on the + 날짜' 패턴을 사용합니다.
